title: CRISPR Editing of Human iPS Cells with RNPs Using Nucleofection
author: Synthego
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.srred56
materials: Aspirate Matrigel® Matrix from the plates after coating.

steps.title: Culture iPS cells on Matrigel® Matrix-coated...
steps.instruction: Culture iPS cells on Matrigel® Matrix-coated plates until they are semiconfluent.

steps.title: Coat a new 6-well plate with...
steps.instruction: Coat a new 6-well plate with Matrigel® Matrix and incubate according to the manufacturer’s instructions.

steps.title: Fill each well with 2 ml...
steps.instruction: Fill each well with 2 ml mTeSR1 medium + 10 μM ROCK inhibitor. undetermined, mTeSR1 medium + 10 μM ROCK inhibitor

steps.title: Incubate at 37°C until nucleofection
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37°C until nucleofection. Undetermined, Incubation

steps.title: Prepare 70 μl additional pre-warmed mTeSR1...
steps.instruction: Prepare 70 μl additional pre-warmed mTeSR1 medium + 10 μM ROCK per reaction for cell recovery after nucleofection. undetermined, mTeSR1 medium + 10 μM ROCK

steps.title: Make sure that the entire Nucleofector...
steps.instruction: Make sure that the entire Nucleofector TM Supplement is added to the Nucleofector TM Solution (according to manufacturer's protocol) and that the mixture is not more than 3 months old.

steps.title: Hydrate sgRNA (3 nmol) in 30...
steps.instruction: Hydrate sgRNA (3 nmol) in 30 μl 1X nuclease-free TE buffer to make 100 μM (100 pmol/μl) sgRNA. Concentration of Cas9 nuclease: 20 μM (20 pmol/μl). undetermined, 1X nuclease-free TE buffer

steps.title: Mix the components following the proportions...
steps.instruction: Mix the components following the proportions given in the table for a single reaction (scale up appropriately). a undetermined, sgRNA undetermined, Cas9

steps.title: Incubate the RNPs at room temperature...
steps.instruction: Incubate the RNPs at room temperature for 10 minutes, then place on ice until use. 00:10:00, Incubation

steps.title: Prior to electroporation, detach the iPS...
steps.instruction: Prior to electroporation, detach the iPS cells from the Matrigel® Matrix plates by incubating with pre-warmed Accutase® for 3-5 minutes at 37°C. Undetermined, Incubation 00:03:00, Incubation

steps.title: Dissociate the cells into a single...
steps.instruction: Dissociate the cells into a single cell suspension by pipetting the suspension carefully up and down 4-6 times.

steps.title: Add the same amount of mTeSR1 medium to stop Accutase®
steps.instruction: Add the same amount of mTeSR1 medium to stop Accutase®.

steps.title: Harvest the cells to an appropriately sized tube
steps.instruction: Harvest the cells to an appropriately sized tube.

steps.title: Count an aliquot of the detached...
steps.instruction: Count an aliquot of the detached cells and determine cell density.

steps.title: Transfer the required number of cells...
steps.instruction: Transfer the required number of cells (5 x 10 5 cells per reaction) to a Corning® 15 ml Centrifuge Tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge cells at 115 x g...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge cells at 115 x g for 3 minutes at room temperature. 00:03:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Aspirate the supernatant completely
steps.instruction: Aspirate the supernatant completely. The cell pellets will not be packed tightly so care is required when removing supernatant.

steps.title: Add 5 ml of PBS buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 5 ml of PBS buffer and wash cells by gently pipetting up and down. undetermined, PBS buffer

steps.title: Centrifuge at 115 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 115 x g for 3 minutes at room temperature. 00:03:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Resuspend cells in Lonza P3 Nucleofector...
steps.instruction: Resuspend cells in Lonza P3 Nucleofector TM solution at 20 μl/reaction. Work quickly, but carefully, and avoid leaving cells in the Nucleofector TM solution for longer than 15 minutes. Avoid bubble formation.

steps.title: Mix 20 μl of cells with...
steps.instruction: Mix 20 μl of cells with 5 μl RNPs (prepared in Step 8) for each reaction in an appropriate tube/plate. undetermined, cells undetermined, RNPs

steps.title: Transfer each cell-RNP solution (25 μl)...
steps.instruction: Transfer each cell-RNP solution (25 μl) to each well of the Nucleocuvette TM strip. Click the lid into place.

steps.title: Gently tap the Nucleocuvette TM strip...
steps.instruction: Gently tap the Nucleocuvette TM strip on the benchtop to make sure the sample covers the bottom of the cuvette and that there are no bubbles in the wells.

steps.title: Place the Nucleocuvette TM strip with...
steps.instruction: Place the Nucleocuvette TM strip with closed lid into the retainer of the 4D-X Core unit. Check for proper orientation of the Nucleocuvette TM strip. Larger cutout is the top (A1 and A2) and smaller cutout is the bottom (H1 and H2).

steps.title: Use the electroporation protocol “CA137
steps.instruction: Use the electroporation protocol “CA137.” Press “Start” on the display of the core unit. After run completion, the screen should display a green “+” over the wells that were successfully transfected. Remove the NucleocuvetteTM strip from the core unit.

steps.title: Use a multichannel pipette to add...
steps.instruction: Use a multichannel pipette to add 70 μl pre-warmed mTeSR1 medium + 10 μM ROCK into each well of the Nucleocuvette TM strip to recover the cells. undetermined, pre-warmed mTeSR1 medium + 10 μM ROCK

steps.title: Transfer cells from each well to...
steps.instruction: Transfer cells from each well to the pre-warmed 6-well plate (prepared in Step 2) and incubate overnight in a humidified 37°C/5% CO 2 incubator. Undetermined, 5% CO2 incubator

steps.title: Change with fresh mTeSR1 (without ROCK...
steps.instruction: Change with fresh mTeSR1 (without ROCK inhibitor) 24 hours after nucleofection and daily until time for cell harvest. 24:00:00

steps.title: Incubate the cells for 4 days...
steps.instruction: Incubate the cells for 4 days in a humidified 37°C/5% CO 2 incubator. Undetermined, 5% CO2 incubator 96:00:00, 5% CO2 incubator

steps.title: Conduct analyses to determine editing efficiency
steps.instruction: Conduct analyses to determine editing efficiency: PCR, Sanger sequencing, and ICE analysis . Next-Gen Sequencing, FACS, or functional tests may be conducted as alternatives. Option : If storing cells for future use is desired, split cells into two groups (one for analysis and one for cell culture).
